title: GSK or TECH: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Medical - Biomedical and Genetics sector might want to consider either GSK (GSK) or Techne (TECH). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: BIO-TECHNE TO HOST CONFERENCE CALL ON AUGUST 8, 2023, TO ANNOUNCE FOURTH QUARTER AND FISCAL 2023 FINANCIAL RESULTS
text: MINNEAPOLIS , July 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today announced that management will host a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, August 8, 2023, at 8:00 a.m. CDT to review fourth quarter and fiscal 2023 financial results.

title: BIO-TECHNE COMPLETES LUNAPHORE ACQUISITION
text: MINNEAPOLIS , July 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ:TECH) today announced it has completed the acquisition of Lunaphore Technologies SA, a leading developer of fully automated spatial biology solutions. Bio-Techne and Lunaphore are combining forces to accelerate their spatial biology leadership position in translational and clinical research markets.

title: GSK vs. TECH: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors interested in Medical - Biomedical and Genetics stocks are likely familiar with GSK (GSK) and Techne (TECH). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?
